name: Lightweight Composite-Toe Shoes
shortDescription: Metal-free composite toe cap for reduced weight and cold conduction.
longDescription: A composite toe cap gives the same impact and compression protection as steel at roughly a third of the weight, with no metal to conduct cold or trigger metal detectors — a common requirement in electronics assembly, cold storage and airport-adjacent facilities.

images.alt: Lightweight Composite-Toe Shoes supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
